hero.title: Task Senpai
hero.jpTagline: 先輩モード • 今日も一歩ずつ
hero.subtitle: Organize, prioritize, and track your work with ease. The ultimate tool for personal and professional productivity.

dashboard.label: Dashboard
dashboard.title: Start your day in one glance
dashboard.desc: See what’s due, what’s overdue, and what matters next.

board.label: Board
board.title: Drag, drop, done
board.desc: Move tasks across statuses with a smooth Kanban workflow.

timeline.label: Timeline
timeline.title: Plan your week visually
timeline.desc: Map tasks across dates to avoid crunch-time surprises.

calendar.label: Calendar
calendar.title: Dates that actually stick
calendar.desc: Quickly pick start/due dates and keep your schedule clean.

goals.label: Goals
goals.title: Turn goals into progress
goals.desc: Track your streaks and milestones with friendly nudges.

featuresSection.title: Everything you need to ship faster
featuresSection.subtitle: From quick capture to daily planning—Task Senpai keeps it fun and focused.

smartFlow.title: Smart flow
smartFlow.desc: Capture tasks fast, then refine with priority, start date, and due date.

dragDrop.title: Drag & drop board
dragDrop.desc: Move cards between columns to instantly update status and momentum.

calendarClarity.title: Calendar clarity
calendarClarity.desc: Plan around real deadlines and keep your week balanced.

timelinePlanning.title: Timeline planning
timelinePlanning.desc: Visualize work over time so you can spot overload early.

assistantBot.title: Assistant bot
assistantBot.desc: Quick actions and friendly guidance help you move without friction.

focusMode.title: Focus mode vibes
focusMode.desc: Background music and subtle animations keep you in the zone.

cta.title: Ready to take control?
cta.subtitle: Start small, build momentum, and watch your workflow level up.

assistant.greeting: Hello! I'm your assistant bot. How can I help you today?

responses.greeting: Hello there! How can I assist you with your tasks today?
responses.taskStats: You have {{total}} total tasks: {{completed}} completed and {{pending}} pending. Keep up the good work!
responses.help: I can help you check your tasks or navigate the app. Try asking about your tasks, or use the Quick Actions below.
responses.default: I'm still learning. Try asking about your tasks, navigation, or check the Quick Actions below!

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your tasks, priorities, and schedule.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Plan your deadlines across the month.

empty.noTasksDue: No tasks due on this day.

goals.title: Goals
goals.subtitle: Set targets and track progress from your tasks.

empty.allAchieved: All goals achieved. Toggle “Show achieved” to see them.
empty.none: No goals yet. Create one to start tracking.

tutorial.title: View Demo
tutorial.subtitle: A quick guided tour of what you can do

welcome.label: Welcome
welcome.title: Welcome to Task Senpai
welcome.desc: This demo walks through the core screens and features so you know where to start.
bullets: Follow the steps on the left to learn each screen.
Use the images as a quick reference for what to look for.
Try View Demo anytime from the landing page.

dashboard.label: Dashboard
dashboard.title: Dashboard: your daily overview
dashboard.desc: Use Dashboard to see what needs attention right now before you start moving tasks around.
bullets: Get a quick snapshot of what’s due today, overdue, and coming up.
Jump from a task to the Board to edit or complete it.
Keep momentum with a clear Next Up list.

board.label: Board
board.title: Board: drag, drop, and organize
board.desc: Use the Board when you want to actively manage tasks and their status.
bullets: Add a task quickly, then refine details later.
Drag tasks across columns to update status instantly.
Search and filter to focus on a subset of work.

calendar.label: Calendar
calendar.title: Calendar: schedule with confidence
calendar.desc: Use Calendar to keep start and due dates consistent across your plan.
bullets: Pick dates quickly and keep your workload balanced.
Spot deadline clusters early.
Use it alongside the Board to stay realistic.

goals.label: Goals
goals.title: Goals: turn outcomes into steps
goals.desc: Use Goals to set targets and track progress across your tasks.
bullets: Add a goal (for example: complete 5 high priority tasks).
Set a due date to stay accountable.
Track remaining work and pace so you can adjust early.

assistant.label: Assistant
assistant.title: Assistant bot: quick help and summaries
assistant.desc: Use the Assistant when you want guidance, status summaries, or navigation shortcuts.
bullets: Ask for a quick summary of your workload.
Jump directly to the view you need.
Get tips on what to do next.

music.label: Music
music.title: Focus music: stay in the zone
music.desc: Use the music player to keep focus while planning and executing tasks.
bullets: Play/pause and switch tracks without leaving your work.
Adjust volume or mute instantly.
Loop a track for longer focus sessions.

finish.label: Finish
finish.title: You’re ready
finish.desc: That’s the demo. Start with Dashboard, then manage tasks on the Board, and track progress with Goals.
bullets: Start small: add a few tasks and move them across the Board.
Set one goal for the week and keep it visible.
Come back to View Demo anytime.
